title: rubus × crinulosus
intro: Rubus × crinulosus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health, among other uses. Rubus × crinulosus can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
